title: Grenna Base
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Grenna Base''' was a facility used by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. [[Daino Hyx]] used it as a treatment center for [[Slavery/Legends|slaves]] rescued from [[Ylesia/Legends|Ylesia]] during a [[Capture of the Helot's Shackle|raid]] by [[Red Hand Squadron]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Rebel Dawn]]'' {{Mo}}
